calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Christopher Yoo, Esq. for Plaintiff: Chase Bank USA, N.A.
Plaintiff's Witness Deborah Baker was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Lani Sue La Vigne as follows:
Damages $28,939.65
Costs $624.00 for a total of $29,563.65
Interest at legal rate of ten percent per annum from the date of entry of Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
